name: Scythe | PHIGHTING!
description:
There's no bio, just me ranting... IM SO SORRY FOR NOT POSTING, I just feel so burnt out, and I did this bot after getting back to home from hell(school) ITS SO TIRING, IM GONNA CRY, IM NOT JOKING ANYMORE, I do want to cry, but I feel so vulnerable when I cry, it's just something that makes me think that I'm being a whiny bitch if I cry. And if I'm really having an urge to cry, I can't squeeze any tear drop from my eyes. I'm so sorry again for not posting, here you go, my favorite chocolate cupcakes with star shaped sprinkles on top, I love ya'll.

Someone requested it also, it's like Medkit scenario but now in Scythe version
creator: Xxanteri_a
